backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores per-user multiplication game progress (unlocked level state) in a map, exposing query and update methods to get and advance level unlocks.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Zelda theme, home screen, level progression, etc.) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme tokens (background, foreground, primary, destructive, etc.) used by shadcn-ui components.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that preloads Cinzel, Cinzel Decorative, and IM Fell English Google Fonts and mounts the React app via the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app file that configures TanStack Router with four routes: Home, Level (with levelId param), LevelComplete, and LevelFailed (both with search param validation).
Animated feedback component that displays a green 'Correct!' or red 'Wrong! The answer was X' message with an icon after each answer submission.
frontend/src/components/GameplayUI.tsx: Full gameplay interface component rendering the level header, HUD (hearts and question counter), progress bar, question display, numeric input, and auto-advancing feedback after 1.5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/HeartIcons.tsx: Renders a row of filled or empty Lucide Heart icons styled in Zelda red to represent the player's remaining lives.
frontend/src/components/ZeldaPanel.tsx: Reusable styled panel component with a parchment background image, decorative corner accent spans, and a double-border HUD frame.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches a backend actor (anonymous or authenticated via Internet Identity) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useGameState.ts: Custom React hook managing all gameplay state including score, mistakes, lives (lose one per 2 mistakes), feedback visibility, and level completion/pass logic for 10-question rounds.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on the ICP platform, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient creation with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching unlocked game levels (`useGetUnlockedLevels`) and mutating to unlock the next level (`useUnlockNextLevel`) via the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS, and defines a Zelda-themed design system with custom CSS variables, component classes (panels, buttons), and color tokens using oklch.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with `QueryClientProvider` and `InternetIdentityProvider` into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page displaying three Zelda-themed level selection cards, showing locked/unlocked state based on the user's progress fetched from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/Level.tsx: Level gameplay page that generates multiplication questions for the selected level, manages game state, and navigates to success or failure screens upon completion while unlocking the next level if passed.
frontend/src/pages/LevelComplete.tsx: Victory screen displayed after passing a level, showing a Zelda-themed reward message, flavor text, score visualization, and navigation buttons to the next level or home.
frontend/src/pages/LevelFailed.tsx: Defeat screen displayed when a level is failed, showing a Zelda-themed defeat message, the player's score, and options to retry the level or return home.
frontend/src/utils/questionGenerator.ts: Defines a Question interface and exports functions to generate randomized multiplication question sets for each of the 3 game levels, with increasing difficulty ranges per level.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with Zelda-inspired custom colors, fantasy fonts (Cinzel, IM Fell), custom box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state including version, architectural notes, existing features, and image requirements for a Zelda-themed gamified multiplication practice app targeting 4th graders.
